What's new now with built-in AI is that we've added a general purpose large language model or LLM for short. In the concrete case, it's actually a relatively small LLM called Gemini Nano. Unlike the other models, Gemini Nano doesn't ship with Chrome by default, but is downloaded dynamically on demand once a web app wants to make use of it. The reason for not shipping it by default is that while it's small for an LLM, it's still a larger resource.
